- **普通移动**：你可以从当前单元格 `(i, j)` 向右或向下移动，即移动到 `(i, j + 1)`（右）或 `(i + 1, j)`（下）。成本为目标单元格的值。

**输入:** grid = [[1,3,3],[2,5,4],[4,3,5]], k = 2

**输出:** 7

**解释:**

我们最初在 (0, 0)，成本为 0。

| 当前位置 | 移动            | 新位置   | 总成本      |
| -------- | --------------- | -------- | ----------- |

到达右下角单元格的最小成本是 7。

**输出:** 9

| `(1, 0)` | 向右移动 | `(1, 1)` | `2 + 3 = 5` |
| `(1, 1)` | 向下移动 | `(2, 1)` | `5 + 4 = 9` |

到达右下角单元格的最小成本是 9。

 

**提示:**

- `2 <= m, n <= 80`
- `m == grid.length`
- `n == grid[i].length`

#include <vector>
#include <queue>

using namespace std;

long long solve(vector<vector<long long>> grid, long long k) {
    int m = grid.size();
    int n = grid[0].size();
    const long long INF = 1e18;

    // Precompute teleport_list
    vector<vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>> teleport_list(m, vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>(n));
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
            for (int x = 0; x < m; ++x) {
                for (int y = 0; y < n; ++y) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleport_list[i][j].push_back({x, y});
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Initialize distance array
    vector<vector<vector<long long>>> dist(m, vector<vector<long long>>(n, vector<long long>(k+1, INF)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    // Priority queue: (negative cost, i, j, t)
    priority_queue<tuple<int, int, int, int>> pq;
    pq.push( {0, 0, 0, 0} );

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [cost_neg, i, j, t] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        long long actual_cost = -cost_neg;

        if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) {
            return actual_cost;
        }

        if (actual_cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue;
        }

        // Regular moves: right and down
        // Right
        if (j + 1 < n) {
            long long new_cost = actual_cost + grid[i][j+1];
            if (new_cost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {
                dist[i][j+1][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {-new_cost, i, j+1, t} );
            }
        }
        // Down
        if (i + 1 < m) {
            long long new_cost = actual_cost + grid[i+1][j];
            if (new_cost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {
                dist[i+1][j][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {-new_cost, i+1, j, t} );
            }
        }

        // Teleportation
        for (auto [x, y] : teleport_list[i][j]) {
            if (t + 1 <= k) {
                long long new_t = t + 1;
                if (actual_cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                    dist[x][y][new_t] = actual_cost;
                    pq.push( {-actual_cost, x, y, new_t} );
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen as per problem statement)
    return -1;
}

long long solve(vector<vector<long long>> grid, long long k) {
    int m = grid.size();
    int n = grid[0].size();
    const long long INF = 1e18;

    // Precompute teleport_list
    vector<vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>> teleport_list(m, vector<vector<pair<int, int>>>(n));
    for (int i = 0; i < m; ++i) {
        for (int j = 0; j < n; ++j) {
            for (int x = 0; x < m; ++x) {
                for (int y = 0; y < n; ++y) {
                    if (grid[x][y] <= grid[i][j]) {
                        teleport_list[i][j].push_back({x, y});
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // Initialize distance array
    vector<vector<vector<long long>>> dist(m, vector<vector<long long>>(n, vector<long long>(k+1, INF)));
    dist[0][0][0] = 0;

    // Priority queue: (negative cost, i, j, t)
    priority_queue<tuple<int, int, int, int>> pq;
    pq.push( {0, 0, 0, 0} );

    while (!pq.empty()) {
        auto [cost_neg, i, j, t] = pq.top();
        pq.pop();

        long long actual_cost = -cost_neg;

        if (i == m-1 && j == n-1) {
            return actual_cost;
        }

        if (actual_cost > dist[i][j][t]) {
            continue;
        }

        // Regular moves: right and down
        // Right
        if (j + 1 < n) {
            long long new_cost = actual_cost + grid[i][j+1];
            if (new_cost < dist[i][j+1][t]) {
                dist[i][j+1][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {-new_cost, i, j+1, t} );
            }
        }
        // Down
        if (i + 1 < m) {
            long long new_cost = actual_cost + grid[i+1][j];
            if (new_cost < dist[i+1][j][t]) {
                dist[i+1][j][t] = new_cost;
                pq.push( {-new_cost, i+1, j, t} );
            }
        }

        // Teleportation
        for (auto [x, y] : teleport_list[i][j]) {
            if (t + 1 <= k) {
                long long new_t = t + 1;
                if (actual_cost < dist[x][y][new_t]) {
                    dist[x][y][new_t] = actual_cost;
                    pq.push( {-actual_cost, x, y, new_t} );
                }
            }
        }
    }

    // If not found (should not happen as per problem statement)
    return -1;
}
